findings.title: Roles follow Canon 4 (owner/brand_admin/manager/analyst), not the requirement's literal Owner/Admin/Analyst/Viewer. No distinct Viewer; Viewer mapped to manager. Sanctioned at architecture (D0.2). Confirm mapping matches intent.
M1 auth is app-native (not Authentik-backed); ADR-006-shaped JWT so Authentik fronts later via token-issuer swap. Sanctioned at architecture (D0.1). Confirm acceptance.

residual.close_by: before first OLAP data flow (managed cluster)

summary: PASS / GO. Independently re-ran the load-bearing checks on live Postgres + a freshly-started @brain/core: turbo 75/75, isolation 15/15 connector-pixel tests REAL on a NOSUPERUSER NOBYPASSRLS role with a firing policy-removal negative control, register smoke writing a real argon2id hash + sha256 audit chain, protected routes returning real 401s, validity clean (98 files). NN-1..NN-7 + L-02 all hold; brain_app cannot bypass RLS (DB truth). Scope is the clean M1 vertical slice (migrations 0002-0007 only; no OLAP/ledger/identity-graph; Shopify-only; Canon 4 roles); zero over-engineering; cost paradigm deterministic-by-construction (no model calls). 0 open CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM. Two architecture-sanctioned deviations (Canon roles incl. Viewer->manager, app-native auth) surfaced for Stakeholder confirmation. All residuals LOW with named owners. No hard-rule deviation. Advance to Stakeholder gate.
